titleStmt.title: SII 42.68: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 68. (A.R. No. B. 16 of 1954-55.) Dharaṇikōṭa, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab in the house of Kakkapilla Babayya.
Undated. Belongs to 11th-12th century Telugu-Kannada characters. Written in Sanskrit and Telugu.

Fragmentary. Gives the genealogy of the chief Rājēndra Chōḍa of the Velanāṭi family. Refers to the originator of the family as Mallavarman, who obtained Velanāṇḍu-vishaya from Tryaṁbaka Pallava for the assistance rendered in the latter's wars.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: Figures of crescent-moon, liṅga, sun in one row and that of Nandin below to the left.

śrī vallabhasyāṁghri sarōjatō vāniraṁttarā ṭi
nadī pravāhaḥ babhūva śuddhaścaraṇābjayugmā
rānanasya . vaṁśōsminsahimāṁśu
vyāpta kṣamāmaṁḍalō dō¨rddaṇḍa
baṁdhavī¨ryya saciva śśrīmallava¨rmmā jani
yēna tryaṁbaka pallavādraṇa śirassāhāyyakā
rādhitāt prāptōyaṁ velanāṇḍu nāma viṣaya ssā
maṁta cihnāni vā . Ākhaṁḍitākhaṁḍala vikramō putra
vaṁśajātēṣu tatō nṛpēṣu gatēṣvanēkēṣu vipakṣa bhūpama
hēṁdradaṁbhōripumānavatsā . tadvaṁśyōbhū dguṇa
maṇi khanidviprasaṁttāpahaṁttā kāṁtākaṁtu
tramakhasēnu kiṁkara śśaṁkarasya dātā śītadyā
sita yaśō pōta dikcakravālō goṁkaḥ śrīmā
ranṛpati Āpaddanīśśakaṭaṁkaḥ . Āsīt priyā
tasya nṛpuṁgavasya goṁkakṣitīśasya śaśāṁka vaktrā sa
bbāṁbikā sa¨rvvaguṇyōpapannā pulōmakanyēva pu
raṁdarasya . tayō¨rjjayaṁta pratimaprabhāvōbhā rā
jēṁdracōḍō vihitāripīḍaḥ Abhūtsutassa
tavāganēkasaṁgrāmaraṁggājjitaśubhra ki
ḍāṁbikāṁgita sabiṁba tulya vaktrānsi(nni)jācāra
dānasūyā Agaṇyapuṇyāṁguṇaratnagu¨rvvī
ḍabhūpādivinō payamē . tābhyāṁ bhavānī
bābhyāṁ jātastanūjaḥ prakāśatthiya
bhūpaḥ śrita nīlakaṁṭhassēvyapuṇyada
gōtra kalāni vānī
Digital edition of SII 42.68 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
